message:
test(math): add 114 integration tests for math_abi (trig, exp/log, rounding, Bessel, C23)

Covers f64/f32/long-double variants, NaN/Inf/negative-zero handling,
domain/range errors, sincos, modf, frexp/ldexp, remquo, nextafter,
fmaximum/fminimum (C23 IEEE 754-2019), __finite aliases, and
type-generic width aliases (f32/f64).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
